sources.name: Zendesk AI Blog
sources.existing_project_coverage: opml_ready: no existing Zendesk source; generic OPML/RSS ingestion exists after feed verification.
sources.verification_notes: The candidate category URL redirects to the official Zendesk AI tag page. The page is public and relevant to AI customer service, agents, copilot, and quality management, but no RSS/Atom declaration was found. Use webpage monitoring and filter out navigation and generic product-marketing text.

sources.name: Atlassian AI / Rovo
sample_titles: Over a million daily MCP tool calls taught us about the future of AI at work
HR in the age of abundant intelligence
sources.existing_project_coverage: opml_ready: no existing Atlassian source; generic OPML/RSS ingestion exists after feed verification.
sources.verification_notes: The candidate AI URL resolves to the broad Inside Atlassian blog. The page includes AI at Work, AI Research, and Rovo material, but the declared blog feed returned HTML in this verification run and could not be parsed as RSS. Monitor focused AI/Rovo blocks rather than ingesting the broad blog.

sources.name: McKinsey State of AI
sources.existing_project_coverage: manual_only: no existing McKinsey source; enterprise source plan treats consulting reports as 30-day manual or deep-report material.
sources.verification_notes: The official McKinsey State of AI page timed out in the script client during this run. This is a low-frequency, high-value research source and should enter the deep-report workflow rather than 24-hour news sorting. No verified public RSS/Atom was found in this batch.

sources.existing_project_coverage: manual_only: no existing Deloitte source; enterprise source plan treats consulting reports as 30-day manual or deep-report material.
sources.verification_notes: The official report page is public and highly relevant to enterprise AI adoption, scaling, governance, ROI, and workforce readiness. No RSS/Atom declaration was found. It should be handled as a deep report source, not a daily news source.

sources.name: 中国信通院专题报告
sources.existing_project_coverage: manual_only: no existing CAICT source; enterprise source plan treats official reports and PDFs as 30-day manual or semi-automated material.
sources.verification_notes: The official CAICT report index returned HTTP 412 to the script client. This is a high-value domestic policy, standards, and deep-report source, but page automation and PDF download stability are insufficient. Use monthly manual review and PDF evidence archiving; do not include it in 24-hour news sorting.
